📊 Per-Participant Correlation Analysis

Understanding the plots:
- X-axis: ParticipantID (P3, P4, P8...P18)
- Y-axis: Mean absolute correlation coefficient
- Dots: Color-coded by participant, labeled with P# and correlation value
- Metric: Average absolute correlation of each signal with all other signals
- 4 subplots per row (PM2.5, PM1, PM10, Temp... etc)
